top_findings.summary: The skill collects and processes raw prompt text (e.g., in the `GenerationEvent` class and `get_popular_prompts` method), which contains user-input content that may include sensitive or personal information. While the primary purpose is usage analytics (tracking generation patterns, cost analysis, dashboards), this can be achieved with aggregated or anonymized data (e.g., counts, durations, model usage) without accessing and storing the full prompt text. Collecting detailed prompts exceeds the minimal data needed for the stated analytics goals and poses unnecessary privacy risks.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill collects and processes raw prompt text (e.g., in the `GenerationEvent` class and `get_popular_prompts` method), which contains user-input content that may include sensitive or personal information. While the primary purpose is usage analytics (tracking generation patterns, cost analysis, dashboards), this can be achieved with aggregated or anonymized data (e.g., counts, durations, model usage) without accessing and storing the full prompt text. Collecting detailed prompts exceeds the minimal data needed for the stated analytics goals and poses unnecessary privacy risks.
